title: coreopsis involucrata
intro: Coreopsis involucrata, also known as the prickly coreopsis or tall tickseed, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow blooms and prickly stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Coreopsis involucrata are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Coreopsis involucrata can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although proper identification and dosing are essential to ensure safe and effective use.
